raw_consumer_statement:
A rug from XXXX was purchased on XX/XX/2025 for {$94.00} and was charged to our Citibank credit card. We disputed the charge and the bank also flagged the other charges after it and closed the card. However we then got a letter on XX/XX/XXXX saying the dispute had been closed as they were unable to identify that a billing error had occured. We also got a letter showing the persons name and email that did purchase the rug, an order number, and it showed our billing information. It also showed a refund was given to the XXXX account holder. 

Our credit card company Citi Bank has not reopened the dispute nor credited our account.
